movie.title: Vritta (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Vritta centers on siddharth a quiet, withdrawn man whose life takes a dark and twisted turn after one impulsive decision.One night. One unexpected phone call. One wrong turn. And that’s all it takes to spiral into the unknown. What begins as a simple night drive unravels into something far more disturbing — a haunting journey through isolation, guilt, and fractured realities. As the silence deepens and the night stretches on, siddharth finds himself trapped in a circle he can’t escape. A circle called vritta.
